# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

image: docker:latest

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME: my-image-name
  ARTIFACTS_DIR: /artifacts

before_script:
  - echo "Prepare environment"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir -p $ARTIFACTS_DIR/binaries
    - cp binary1 $ARTIFACTS_DIR/binaries/
    - cp config1 $ARTIFACTS_DIR/configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/binaries/*
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/configs/*
    expire_in: 30d

deploy-dev:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploy to dev environment"
    - curl -o /dev/null -s -w "%{http_code}" http://dev-server.com/artifacts.zip
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true

deploy-prod:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploy to prod environment"
    - curl -o /prod-server.com/artifacts.zip http://prod-server.com/artifacts.zip
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
